description: Enterprise sales: $100k+ deals, multi-stakeholder, long cycles, consensus-building

items.name: Multiple stakeholder management
items.tactic: Map: Economic Buyer, User, Champion, Influencer. Each has different concerns. Economic: ROI. User: ease of use. Champion: career advancement. Sell to each separately.

items.name: Consensus-building sequences
items.tactic: Don't close with one. Build consensus: champion → influencer → user → economic. Each step removes objection for next.

items.name: Procurement process navigation
items.tactic: RFP, vendor evaluation, references, pilots. Shorten cycle: offer pilot early. Prove value. Procurement rubber-stamps.
